# Pocket Audio Core Fixtures

This folder will hold raw Pocket Chordsmith JSON projects, `PCS1:` share-code equivalents, golden event traces, and render metadata.

The scaffold tests currently create a minimal fixture inline. Later parity work should add committed fixture files for:

- 4/4 major
- 3/4
- swing
- tuplets/triplets
- holds and slides
- guitar
- multiple melody tracks
- sidechain and FX
- full A-H sequence material
